## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New tutorial / content page
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code cleanup / refactor

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Tested on desktop browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Verified links are valid
- [ ] Ran `python3 build.py` (if search index or stats changed)

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of this project
- [ ] I have checked my changes don't introduce broken links or 404s
- [ ] If adding a new page, I've verified it appears in the search index after running `build.py`
- [ ] The page renders correctly in both light and dark mode
- [ ] The page works without JavaScript (basic content is visible)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the change.
